name: mrm-purview-both-active
description: Both MRM and Purview retention active on mailbox

commands.output:
Name: 7-Year Corporate Retention
ExchangeLocation: All
DistributionStatus: Success

Name: Corp 30-Day Delete
RetentionPolicyTagLinks: {30-Day Delete and Allow Recovery}

commands.command: Get-RetentionPolicyTag | Format-List Name, RetentionAction, AgeLimitForRetention, RetentionEnabled
commands.output:
Name: 30-Day Delete and Allow Recovery
RetentionAction: DeleteAndAllowRecovery
AgeLimitForRetention: 30.00:00:00
RetentionEnabled: True

Name: 7-Year Corporate Retention Rule
Policy: 7-Year Corporate Retention
RetentionDuration: 2555
RetentionComplianceAction: KeepAndDelete
Enabled: True
